case_title: YUTO MORI VS. SHELBY DEAN GONZALEZ

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-25-2024 - JUDGMENT.
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY MORI, YUTO AS TO DEFENDANT GONZALEZ, SHELBY DEAN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-25-2024 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVICE FEE: $125 SERVED FEB-08-2024, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT GONZALEZ, SHELBY DEAN

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAR-25-2024 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAR-25-2024 BY VISITING JUDGE. PLAINTIFF YUTO MORI IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT SHELBY DEAN GONZALEZ IS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: BRIAN STRETCH; CLERK: D. CARTER. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
REMARK: EXHIBITS DESTROYED PURSUANT TO ORDER FILED ON 8/4/2025. (SEE MANAGER FOR ORDER.)
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT GONZALEZ, SHELBY DEAN

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MORI, YUTO RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GONZALEZ, SHELBY DEAN $1,295.87 PRINCIPAL, $200.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,495.87 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
